meaning: A state where you burn more calories than you consume, leading to weight loss.
definition: A state where you burn more calories than you consume, leading to weight loss.
example: To lose weight in a healthy way, you should create a moderate calorie deficit by eating less and moving more.
exampleHindi: स्वस्थ तरीके से वजन कम करने के लिए, आपको कम खाकर और अधिक घूमकर मध्यम कैलोरी की कमी पैदा करनी चाहिए।

meaning: A state where you consume more calories than you burn, which is often used to build muscle mass.
definition: A state where you consume more calories than you burn, which is often used to build muscle mass.
example: Bodybuilders enter a calorie surplus when they want to gain muscle and strength during their training.
exampleHindi: जब बॉडीबिल्डर्स अपने प्रशिक्षण के दौरान मांसपेशियों और ताकत हासिल करना चाहते हैं तो वे कैलोरी अधिशेष में प्रवेश करते हैं।

meaning: A dietary approach that focuses on eating whole, minimally processed foods that are as close to their natural state as possible.
definition: A dietary approach that focuses on eating whole, minimally processed foods that are as close to their natural state as possible.
example: Clean eating involves choosing fresh fruits, vegetables, and whole grains over packaged snacks.
exampleHindi: स्वच्छ भोजन में पैकेज्ड स्नैक्स के बजाय ताजे फल, सब्जियां और साबुत अनाज का चयन करना शामिल है।

meaning: A severe, rapid weight-loss plan where you dramatically restrict your food intake, which is often unhealthy and unsustainable.
definition: A severe, rapid weight-loss plan where you dramatically restrict your food intake, which is often unhealthy and unsustainable.
example: Instead of a crash diet, it is better to adopt long-term habits that support a healthy weight.
exampleHindi: क्रैश डाइट के बजाय, दीर्घकालिक आदतों को अपनाना बेहतर है जो स्वस्थ वजन का समर्थन करती हैं।

meaning: Containing no milk or milk products from animals, often replaced with plant-based alternatives like almond milk or oat milk.
definition: Containing no milk or milk products from animals, often replaced with plant-based alternatives like almond milk or oat milk.
example: This vegan ice cream is completely dairy-free, made instead with coconut milk.
exampleHindi: यह शाकाहारी आइसक्रीम पूरी तरह से डेयरी-मुक्त है, इसे नारियल के दूध से बनाया गया है।

meaning: A product taken by mouth that contains a dietary ingredient (like a vitamin, mineral, or herb) intended to add to your diet.
definition: A product taken by mouth that contains a dietary ingredient (like a vitamin, mineral, or herb) intended to add to your diet.
example: She takes a vitamin B12 dietary supplement because she follows a strict vegan diet.
exampleHindi: वह विटामिन बी12 आहार अनुपूरक लेती है क्योंकि वह सख्त शाकाहारी आहार का पालन करती है।

meaning: A short-term eating plan that removes specific foods that may cause allergies or digestive issues, then slowly reintroduces them to identify triggers.
definition: A short-term eating plan that removes specific foods that may cause allergies or digestive issues, then slowly reintroduces them to identify triggers.
example: Her doctor recommended an elimination diet to find out if dairy was causing her skin breakouts.
exampleHindi: उसके डॉक्टर ने यह पता लगाने के लिए उन्मूलन आहार की सिफारिश की कि क्या डेयरी उत्पाद उसकी त्वचा पर दाने का कारण बन रहे हैं।

meaning: The practice of consuming food in response to feelings (such as stress, sadness, or boredom) instead of physical hunger.
definition: The practice of consuming food in response to feelings (such as stress, sadness, or boredom) instead of physical hunger.
example: Recognizing emotional eating is the first step toward finding healthier ways to cope with stress, like taking a walk.
exampleHindi: भावनात्मक खान-पान को पहचानना तनाव से निपटने के लिए स्वस्थ तरीके खोजने की दिशा में पहला कदम है, जैसे टहलना।

meaning: A movement that promotes serving local food at restaurants and school cafeterias, preferably sourced directly from the producer.
definition: A movement that promotes serving local food at restaurants and school cafeterias, preferably sourced directly from the producer.
example: The restaurant prides itself on its farm-to-table menu, featuring ingredients harvested that very morning.
exampleHindi: रेस्तरां अपने फार्म-टू-टेबल मेनू पर गर्व करता है, जिसमें उसी सुबह काटी गई सामग्री शामिल होती है।

meaning: A person who has a primarily vegetarian diet but occasionally eats meat or fish.
definition: A person who has a primarily vegetarian diet but occasionally eats meat or fish.
example: Being a flexitarian allowed her to reduce her environmental footprint without giving up meat entirely.
exampleHindi: फ्लेक्सिटेरियन होने के कारण उसे मांस को पूरी तरह से छोड़े बिना अपने पर्यावरणीय प्रभाव को कम करने की अनुमति मिली।

meaning: An immune system reaction that occurs soon after eating a certain food, which can cause serious symptoms like trouble breathing.
definition: An immune system reaction that occurs soon after eating a certain food, which can cause serious symptoms like trouble breathing.
example: Because of a severe peanut allergy, she must always carry an epinephrine injector wherever she goes.
exampleHindi: गंभीर मूंगफली एलर्जी के कारण, वह जहां भी जाती है उसे हमेशा एक एपिनेफ्रिन इंजेक्टर ले जाना पड़ता है।

meaning: A digestive system response that occurs when your body cannot properly break down a certain food, causing discomfort.
definition: A digestive system response that occurs when your body cannot properly break down a certain food, causing discomfort.
example: His lactose intolerance means he gets a stomachache if he drinks regular cow's milk.
exampleHindi: उसकी लैक्टोज असहिष्णुता का मतलब है कि अगर वह नियमित गाय का दूध पीता है तो उसे पेट में दर्द होता है।

meaning: Containing no gluten, a protein found in wheat and other grains; essential for people with celiac disease.
definition: Containing no gluten, a protein found in wheat and other grains; essential for people with celiac disease.
example: Many bakeries now offer gluten-free bread made from almond or rice flour.
exampleHindi: कई बेकरियां अब बादाम या चावल के आटे से बनी ग्लूटेन-मुक्त ब्रेड पेश करती हैं।

meaning: An eating pattern that cycles between periods of eating and periods of fasting.
definition: An eating pattern that cycles between periods of eating and periods of fasting.
example: She practices intermittent fasting by eating all her meals within an eight-hour window every day.
exampleHindi: वह हर दिन आठ घंटे के भीतर अपना सारा भोजन खाकर आंतरायिक उपवास का अभ्यास करती है।

meaning: An approach to food that rejects diet rules and encourages you to listen to your body's natural hunger and fullness signals.
definition: An approach to food that rejects diet rules and encourages you to listen to your body's natural hunger and fullness signals.
example: By practicing intuitive eating, she learned to eat when she was hungry and stop when she felt satisfied.
exampleHindi: सहज भोजन का अभ्यास करके, उसने भूख लगने पर खाना और संतुष्ट होने पर खाना बंद करना सीख लिया।

meaning: A high-fat, adequate-protein, low-carbohydrate diet that forces the body to burn fats rather than carbohydrates for energy.
definition: A high-fat, adequate-protein, low-carbohydrate diet that forces the body to burn fats rather than carbohydrates for energy.
example: People on a ketogenic diet avoid sugary foods and grains, focusing instead on meats, eggs, and healthy oils.
exampleHindi: केटोजेनिक आहार पर लोग मीठे खाद्य पदार्थों और अनाज से बचते हैं, इसके बजाय मांस, अंडे और स्वस्थ तेलों पर ध्यान केंद्रित करते हैं।

meaning: Short for meal preparation; the practice of planning, preparing, and packaging meals in advance to save time and eat healthier.
definition: Short for meal preparation; the practice of planning, preparing, and packaging meals in advance to save time and eat healthier.
example: She spends her Sunday afternoons doing meal prep so she has healthy lunches ready for the work week.
exampleHindi: वह अपनी रविवार की दोपहर को भोजन की तैयारी में बिताती है ताकि वह कार्य सप्ताह के लिए स्वस्थ दोपहर का भोजन तैयार कर सके।

meaning: A drink, bar, or soup intended as a substitute for a solid meal, often containing controlled amounts of calories and nutrients.
definition: A drink, bar, or soup intended as a substitute for a solid meal, often containing controlled amounts of calories and nutrients.
example: He drinks a protein-rich meal replacement shake in the morning when he is running late for work.
exampleHindi: सुबह जब उसे काम के लिए देर हो रही होती है तो वह प्रोटीन युक्त भोजन प्रतिस्थापन शेक पीता है।

meaning: A dietary pattern rich in vegetables, fruits, whole grains, beans, nuts, and olive oil, with moderate amounts of fish and poultry.
definition: A dietary pattern rich in vegetables, fruits, whole grains, beans, nuts, and olive oil, with moderate amounts of fish and poultry.
example: The Mediterranean diet is widely praised by doctors for its benefits to heart health and longevity.
exampleHindi: हृदय स्वास्थ्य और दीर्घायु के लिए इसके लाभों के लिए डॉक्टरों द्वारा भूमध्यसागरीय आहार की व्यापक रूप से प्रशंसा की जाती है।

meaning: The practice of paying full attention to your food, your hunger cues, and your eating experience without distractions.
definition: The practice of eating slowly and paying full attention to the taste, smell, and texture of your food.
example: Mindful eating helps you appreciate the taste of your food and prevents you from overeating.
exampleHindi: माइंडफुल ईटिंग आपको अपने भोजन के स्वाद की सराहना करने में मदद करती है और आपको अधिक खाने से रोकती है।

meaning: Containing a high amount of nutrients (like vitamins, minerals, and fiber) relative to its calorie content.
definition: Containing a high amount of nutrients (like vitamins, minerals, and fiber) relative to its calorie content.
example: Backup vitamins and fiber make spinach extremely nutrient-dense, offering plenty of health benefits with very few calories.
exampleHindi: बैकअप विटामिन और फाइबर पालक को अत्यधिक पोषक तत्वों से भरपूर बनाते हैं, जो बहुत कम कैलोरी के साथ ढेर सारे स्वास्थ्य लाभ प्रदान करते हैं।

meaning: Food produced using farming methods that do not involve artificial chemicals, pesticides, or genetically modified organisms.
definition: Food produced using farming methods that do not involve artificial chemicals, pesticides, or genetically modified organisms.
example: Organic food is often more expensive because the natural farming methods require more labor.
exampleHindi: जैविक भोजन अक्सर अधिक महंगा होता है क्योंकि प्राकृतिक खेती के तरीकों में अधिक श्रम की आवश्यकता होती है।

meaning: A person who does not eat meat but does eat fish and seafood, often along with vegetables and grains.
definition: A person who does not eat meat but does eat fish and seafood, often along with vegetables and grains.
example: As a pescatarian, he gets his protein from salmon, shrimp, and plant sources like beans and tofu.
exampleHindi: एक पेस्केटेरियन के रूप में, वह अपना प्रोटीन सैल्मन, झींगा और बीन्स और टोफू जैसे पौधों के स्रोतों से प्राप्त करते हैं।

meaning: A diet consisting mostly or entirely of foods derived from plants, with few or no animal products.
definition: A diet consisting mostly of foods derived from plants, such as vegetables, grains, nuts, and fruits.
example: Switching to a plant-based diet helped him lower his blood pressure and increase his daily fiber intake.
exampleHindi: पौधे-आधारित आहार पर स्विच करने से उन्हें अपना रक्तचाप कम करने और दैनिक फाइबर सेवन बढ़ाने में मदद मिली।

meaning: The practice of limiting the amount of food you eat in one sitting to manage weight and prevent overeating.
definition: The practice of limiting the amount of food you eat in one sitting to manage weight and prevent overeating.
example: Using smaller plates is a simple trick that helps with portion control during dinner.
exampleHindi: छोटी प्लेटों का उपयोग करना एक सरल तरकीब है जो रात के खाने के दौरान भाग नियंत्रण में मदद करती है।

meaning: The perception that large portion sizes of food are normal, often leading to overeating without realizing it.
definition: The perception that large portion sizes of food are normal, often leading to overeating without realizing it.
example: Restaurant plates are much larger now than in the past, contributing to portion distortion.
exampleHindi: पहले की तुलना में अब रेस्तरां की प्लेटें बहुत बड़ी हो गई हैं, जो हिस्से के विरूपण में योगदान करती हैं।

meaning: The sudden drop in energy and mood that occurs after consuming a large amount of sugar or simple carbohydrates.
definition: The sudden drop in energy and mood that occurs after consuming a large amount of sugar or simple carbohydrates.
example: Eating a donut for breakfast caused a sugar crash that left him feeling exhausted by noon.
exampleHindi: नाश्ते में डोनट खाने से शुगर की समस्या हो गई जिससे वह दोपहर तक थका हुआ महसूस करने लगे।

meaning: Industrial formulations made mostly from substances extracted from foods, containing additives like colorings, flavorings, and preservatives.
definition: Industrial formulations made mostly from substances extracted from foods, containing additives like colorings, flavorings, and preservatives.
example: Potato chips, soda, and instant noodles are examples of ultra-processed food that we should try to limit.
exampleHindi: आलू के चिप्स, सोडा और इंस्टेंट नूडल्स अति-प्रसंस्कृत भोजन के उदाहरण हैं जिन्हें हमें सीमित करने का प्रयास करना चाहिए।

meaning: The practice of avoiding all animal products in food, clothing, and other aspects of life.
definition: The practice of avoiding all animal products in food, clothing, and other aspects of life.
example: Veganism requires reading food labels carefully to ensure there are no dairy, egg, or honey ingredients.
exampleHindi: शाकाहारवाद के लिए भोजन के लेबल को ध्यान से पढ़ने की आवश्यकता होती है ताकि यह सुनिश्चित किया जा सके कि इसमें कोई डेयरी, अंडा या शहद सामग्री नहीं है।

meaning: Foods that are unprocessed and unrefined, or processed and refined as little as possible, before being consumed.
definition: Foods that are unprocessed and unrefined, or processed and refined as little as possible, before being consumed.
example: A basket of fresh apples, broccoli, and raw almonds is a great example of whole foods.
exampleHindi: ताजे सेब, ब्रोकोली और कच्चे बादाम की एक टोकरी संपूर्ण खाद्य पदार्थों का एक बेहतरीन उदाहरण है।
